manifest.name: Homework Manager

name: Homework Manager

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed #13 where shrinking the obsidian window would make to-do circles become squished (desktop and mobile).

## Full Changelog
https://github.com/kadisonm/obsidian-homework-plugin/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features
- **Views:** Switch between different views, each with its own set of tasks, making it easy to separate work-related and personal to-dos.
- **Top-level tasks:** Tasks can now be added directly under views without a parent subject.
- **Shortened due dates:** Due dates now display 'today' and 'tomorrow' when applicable.
- **View manager (@HerrChaos #12):** Views can be added and removed through the view manager modal.
- **Editing tasks & subjects (@HerrChaos #12):** Subject names, task names, due dates, and attached files can now be edited.
- **Reordering tasks (@HerrChaos #12):** Tasks parented to a subject can be arranged in any order.
- **Auto-sorting subjects (@HerrChaos #12)** Subjects can be auto-sorted by the number of tasks under them. (togglable in settings)

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed #8 where words on longer task names get split up by character instead of word.

## New Contributors
* @HerrChaos made their first contribution in https://github.com/kadisonm/obsidian-homework-plugin/pull/12. Huge thanks for all the hard work!

## Full Changelog
https://github.com/kadisonm/obsidian-homework-plugin/compare/1.0.1...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Now allows users to use special characters.
- Now warns users for creating an empty task/subject or if they only contain spaces.
- Now warns users for making duplicate tasks/subjects.

releases.author: kadisonm
releases.description:
First release includes:
- Creating and removing subjects

- Overdue tasks
